ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* The strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  "gene_length" INTEGER /* The length of the gene */,
  "organism" TEXT /* The organism the gene belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the experiment (e.g., gene expression analysis) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the experiment ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, paused) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* The name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* The source of funding for the experiment */,
  "lab_location" TEXT /* The location of the lab where the experiment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the gene in the experiment */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the gene in the experiment */,
  "odds_ratio" REAL /* Odds ratio of the gene in the experiment */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the result */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the result */,
  "p_value" REAL /* The p-value of the result */,
  "q_value" REAL /* The q-value (adjusted p-value) of the result */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to calculate the result (e.g., t-test, ANOVA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_experiment_results_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the annotation (e.g., NCBI, Ensembl) */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* The date when the annotation was made */,
  "curator" TEXT /* The name of the curator who made the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* The type of the data file (e.g., FASTA, FASTQ, SAM) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* The format of the data file (e.g., text, binary) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* The checksum of the file for integrity verification */,
  "uploader" TEXT /* The name of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_ontology" (
  "go_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene ontology term */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* Gene ontology term */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* The evidence code supporting the GO term */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* The database or source that assigned the GO term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_ontology_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uniprot" (
  "uniprot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UniProt entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "uniprot_entry" TEXT /* UniProt entry */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* The name of the protein associated with the gene */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* The length of the protein sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uniprot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_uniprot_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the browser or tool used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of the parameter value (e.g., °C, pH units) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression value */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment in which the expression was measured */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line in which the expression was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* The method used to measure gene expression (e.g., qPCR, RNA-seq) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_cell_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_line_id") REFERENCES cell_lines ("cell_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_lines" (
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell line */,
  "cell_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell line */,
  "species" TEXT /* The species of the cell line */,
  "origin_tissue" TEXT /* The tissue of origin for the cell line */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* The disease state of the cell line (e.g., normal, cancer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_cell_lines" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "cell_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell line used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "cell_line_id")
)
